reason: The remediation only adds the 'enforce_for_root' option to /etc/security/pwquality.conf, a standard PAM password‑policy setting. It does not alter existing root credentials and will only enforce complexity on future password changes, making lockout unlikely.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Future root password changes may be rejected if they do not meet complexity requirements; Incorrect file syntax could cause PAM to fail to load
